error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Cosa service. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.invalid_auth: The username or password you entered is incorrect. Please verify your Cosa account credentials and try again.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred while connecting to the Cosa service. Please try again later.

data_description.password: The password of your Cosa account.
data_description.username: The email address of your Cosa account.

set_mode_failed.message: Failed to set the thermostat mode. The Cosa service did not accept the request. Please try again later.

set_temperature_failed.message: Failed to set the target temperature. The Cosa service did not accept the request. Please try again later.

unsupported_hvac_mode.message: The selected HVAC mode is not supported by this Cosa thermostat.
